title: covellia lepicarpa
intro: Covellia lepicarpa, also known as the hairy-leaved covellia, is a species of flowering plant in the family Boraginaceae. It is traditionally used in folk medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects. The health benefits of Covellia lepicarpa include its ability to reduce inflammation and alleviate symptoms of respiratory issues, such as bronchitis and asthma. Covellia lepicarpa can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, or decoctions, which are often used to treat various health conditions.
